shared_properties: Uses the project core palette copy #D4AF37/#2B1B17/#00FFFF.
Keeps the player body anchored to the same duel slot as the idle sheet.
Robe, wand, and card satchel silhouette remain readable against the maroon hall.
differences: This file carries the active counter-cast arc and forward torso twist.
Cyan reflection ribbon expands from a 12 px core to a 52 px arc by the final frame.

reference_images.label: player_concept
reference_images.purpose: Ground the player silhouette and hand pose.

reference_images.label: source_gdd
reference_images.purpose: Ground reflect-success animation, perfect timing read, and counterattack role.

bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load assets/art/reflect_academy/trial_5/character_player_reflect_cast_6f_10fps.png with AssetServer during Loading state and store the handle under character_player_reflect_cast_6f_10fps.
runtime_notes: Create a 6-column TextureAtlasLayout and trigger it only on Good or Perfect timing resolution.
Keep the hip anchor aligned with the idle sprite so combat snap transitions do not jitter.
Reset to the idle handle when the cast sheet completes its one-shot playback.

context.usage: Triggered when the player commits a valid card inside the Good or Perfect timing window.

shape.silhouette: Forward-twisting mage stance with a wide wand sweep and cyan reflection ribbon.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite sheet canvas is exactly 720x180 px with 6 frames.
Reflection ribbon reaches at least 52 px from the wand tip in the final frame.
Body anchor matches the idle sheet so feet stay inside the same duel slot footprint.
